name: LevelMark
summary: The LevelMark class defines a drawing object that is displayed as a level mark in a drawing. See the Tekla Structures help for more information.

constructors.name: LevelMark
constructors.signature: public LevelMark(ViewBase View, Point InsertionPoint, Point BasePoint)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LevelMark class using the default standard attributes.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view where to insert the level mark.

params.name: InsertionPoint
params.doc: The location where to place the level mark.

params.name: BasePoint
params.doc: The location where to the level mark points.

constructors.name: LevelMark
constructors.signature: public LevelMark(ViewBase View, Point InsertionPoint, Point BasePoint, LevelMark.LevelMarkAttributes Attributes)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LevelMark class using the given attributes.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view where to insert the level mark.

params.name: InsertionPoint
params.doc: The location where to place the level mark.

params.name: BasePoint
params.doc: The location where to the level mark points.

params.name: Attributes
params.doc: The level mark attributes to be applied.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the level mark from the current drawing database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: GetAxisAlignedBoundingBox
methods.summary: Returns the axis aligned bounding box of the level mark (rectangle format).

returns.doc: The bounding box of the level mark.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(Dictionary.String, Double..)
methods.signature: public bool GetDoubleUserProperties(out Dictionary<string, double> values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all double user properties for the object with the given list of names.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties(List.String., Dictionary.String, Double..)

params.name: names
params.doc: List of names to get the values for.

params.name: values
params.doc: Dictionary of name/value pairs that contain the values of the found user properties with the given names.

returns.doc: True if the request succeeded (the returned values can still be empty if no such UserProperties were found).

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref double Value)
methods.summary: Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Int32.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref int Value)
methods.summary: Gets an integer property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, String.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref string Value)
methods.summary: Gets a string property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.

methods.name: GetView
methods.summary: Gets the view where the drawing object is.

returns.doc: The view where the drawing object is.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the level mark into the current drawing database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: IsSameDatabaseObject
methods.summary: Returns true if the current object and the given object are referencing the same database object.

params.name: Object
params.doc: The other object to be used.

returns.doc: True if the objects are referencing the same database object.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the level mark in the current drawing database.

returns.doc: True on success.

throws.when: Thrown if Attributes contains values that are not supported by the object.

methods.name: MoveObjectRelative
methods.summary: Moves the object using the move vector.

params.name: MoveVector
params.doc: The move vector to be used.

returns.doc: True.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects the level mark from the current drawing database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, double Value)
methods.summary: Sets a double property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, int Value)
methods.summary: Sets an integer property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetUserProperty(String, String)
methods.signature: public bool SetUserProperty(string Name, string Value)
methods.summary: Sets a string property for the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

throws.when: Throws an exception if property name or value have larger than supported length.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Changes the string presentation of the drawing object.

returns.doc: The name of the current drawing object.

properties.name: Attributes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the level mark attributes.

properties.name: BasePoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets the level mark base point.

properties.name: Hideable
properties.summary: Gets the information if this object is hidden or not or if it should be.

properties.name: InsertionPoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets the level mark insertion point.

properties.name: Placing
properties.summary: Gets or sets the current placing of the object. See the placing types for different placing options.

properties.name: QueryReturnValue
properties.summary: Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).

properties.name: SubType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the subtype of the level mark.
